title: Fix PHP Syntax Error on Manage Account Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to access the Manage Account page without encountering server errors, so that I can manage my account settings and shared users.
description: Fix a PHP syntax error (unexpected token 'if') that caused a 500 Internal Server Error when navigating to the Manage Account page. The error was caused by a missing semicolon in the PHP code.
acceptance_criteria: Manage Account page loads without errors
No PHP syntax errors in the account management code
middleware_changes: Fixed PHP syntax error (missing semicolon) in the account management controller.
implementation_notes: Root cause was a missing semicolon at the end of a line. Developer acknowledged the need for better pre-deployment validation.
comment_summary: Developer identified and fixed the missing semicolon. Acknowledged the need for better code quality checks.
